subject: Re: From Catherine
body:
no problem

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, December 11, 2006 7:52:12 AM
Subject: From Catherine

Hi JE,

Are you in town?  I could tell you how bad my life is but you already know that.  I was to start work today for Ghislaine but now changed to Wed.  I worked all weekend to tie up lose ends with my other job with not complete success. I didn't even go to Andrea's birthday party.

I will go ahead and have my father create a chair for you to see.  I have no doubt (nor does he) he will be able to replicate to perfection.  Wondering if they could have a payment upfront simply b/c they have no money for chair materials and it will certainly help life a weight and stress from my shoulders.  

Hope to chat/talk to you soon!  Thanks again for everything!  You are the best.

 

Catherine
